ddls:
CREATE TABLE "http_request_headers" (
  "header_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HTTP request header */,
  "header_name" TEXT /* Name of the HTTP request header */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief description of the HTTP request header */,
  "effective_value" TEXT /* Effective value of the HTTP request header */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Whether the HTTP request header is required */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the HTTP request header */,
  "method_override" INTEGER /* Whether the header is used for method overriding */,
  "header_override" INTEGER /* Whether the header is used for header overriding */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the header was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the header was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the header is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("header_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authentication_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authentication token */,
  "token_value" TEXT /* Value of the authentication token */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Type of authentication token (e.g., Bearer, OAuth 2.0) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the authentication token expires */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the token */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* ID of the client application associated with the token */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the token */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the token is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_keys" (
  "request_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request key */,
  "request_key_value" TEXT /* Value of the request key */,
  "header_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HTTP request header associated with the request key */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the authentication token associated with the request key */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request associated with the request key */,
  "method" TEXT /* HTTP method used in the request */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request key was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the request key is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_keys_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("token_id") REFERENCES authentication_tokens ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_keys_header_id FOREIGN KEY ("header_id") REFERENCES http_request_headers ("header_id")
)
